hero.headline: Your digital workshop assistant
hero.subline: Track components, plan maintenance, never miss a service again.

preview.title: See BikeFloor in action
preview.subtitle: Real screenshots from the app — no mockups, no placeholders.

features.title: Everything your workshop needs
features.subtitle: Six reasons why BikeFloor revolutionizes your bike management.

tracking.title: Wear & Rotation
tracking.description: Track wear on every component. Rotate chains in a pool system and see predictions for when the next swap is due.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Planning
maintenance.description: Set intervals by km, hours, or days. BikeFloor warns you in time — never miss a service again.

strava.title: Strava Live Sync
strava.description: Connect Strava and import rides automatically via webhook. Kilometers count themselves, wear updates in real time.

inventory.title: Inventory & Parts Catalog
inventory.description: Manage spare parts in your inventory and install them on your bike with one click. Over 150 parts in the catalog for quick setup.

workshop.title: Favorite Shops
workshop.description: Save your workshops with contact details and send repair requests with all due services directly via email.

multibike.title: Garage & Documents
multibike.description: All bikes in one garage with photos. Store invoices, warranties, and manuals right on the bike.

prediction.title: Smart Wear Prediction
prediction.description: BikeFloor analyzes your riding profile and calculates when each component is due — with confidence scoring and cost forecasting.

raceday.title: Race-Day Checklists
raceday.description: Discipline-specific checklists for time trials, MTB, and gravel — with equipment, nutrition, and your personal setup.

gpxImport.title: GPX/FIT Import
gpxImport.description: Import GPX and FIT files via drag & drop. Routes are displayed on the map — perfect for Garmin, Wahoo, and more.

steps.title: How it works
steps.subtitle: Three steps to full control over your fleet.

step1.title: Add your bike
step1.description: Create your bike profile with type, manufacturer, and components.

step2.title: Connect Strava
step2.description: Link your Strava account for automatic ride imports.

step3.title: Maintenance under control
step3.description: BikeFloor tracks wear and reminds you about services in time.

bikeTypes.title: Made for every bike
bikeTypes.subtitle: Whether asphalt, trail, gravel, or city traffic — BikeFloor fits.

road.title: Road Bike
road.description: Chain, cassette, brake pads — every kilometer counts.

mtb.title: Mountain Bike
mtb.description: Fork, shock, dropper — complex maintenance, simply managed.

gravel.title: Gravel
gravel.description: The best of both worlds — with the right service plan.

city.title: City / Commuter
city.description: Reliably to work — with tire pressure and light check.

tt.title: Time Trial / Triathlon
tt.description: Aero setup, disc wheels, extensions — every detail counts against the clock.

pricing.title: Simple, fair pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free — upgrade when you need more.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect to try it out with one bike.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For ambitious riders with multiple bikes.

fleet.name: Fleet
fleet.description: For the full garage — no limits.

bottomCta.title: Ready for the overview?
bottomCta.subtitle: Start now and keep your bikes in check — completely free.

components.title: Every Part, Tracked
components.description: Monitor wear on every component. Rotate parts between bikes and let BikeFloor predict when the next swap is due.
components.bullet4: Smart prediction based on your riding profile

rides.title: Your Kilometers Count Themselves
rides.description: Connect Strava or import GPX/FIT files — your rides are captured automatically. Wear updates in real-time.

overview.title: Overview
overview.text: BikeFloor takes the protection of your personal data seriously. This privacy policy informs you about what data we collect and how we use it.

dataCollection.title: Data We Collect
dataCollection.text: When you use BikeFloor, we collect the following data:
dataCollection.item1: Email address and password upon registration
dataCollection.item2: Bike data (type, manufacturer, model, components, mileage)

strava.title: Strava Integration
strava.text: When you connect your Strava account, we import ride data (distance, duration, date) to automatically update mileage. You can disconnect at any time in the settings. We do not store Strava credentials — authentication is handled via OAuth 2.0.

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.text: Your data is securely stored with Supabase (EU region). Uploaded documents are stored encrypted. We do not share your data with third parties.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: BikeFloor only uses technically necessary cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.item3: Delete your data (delete account in settings)
rights.item4: Export your data (Excel export in settings)

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: For privacy-related questions, please reach us at the address provided in the imprint.

responsible.title: Responsible according to § 5 TMG

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The contents of this app were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. BikeFloor serves as a tool for maintenance planning — the actual inspection and maintenance of your bicycle is your responsibility.
